55:
Will you join me, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>? You were there at the company's inception─'tis only fitting that you be present at its end.


And...I would appreciate the support.

67:
Commander.
...<Emphasis>Alphinaud</Emphasis>. Our minds are made up, so ye may as well get used to it. Let us help the Scions. Let us help you find Minfilia an' the others.
